title: Music Selector
description: Adds a music selection screen that allow you to pick which music to play, using the new 1.21.6 dialog features.
body:
## Music Selector By hmida_16 A very simple Data Pack that was made in like 30 minutes. It uses minecraft's new custom screens features for 1.21.6 to add a music selection GUI, where you can pick music from the minecraft soundtrack to play. The menu can be accessed from the Pause Screen, or by pressing "G" (or whatever key you have for the new Quick Actions keybind). Note that you can only pick sound events instead of specific tracks. For example If you want the song "Taswell" by C418, you can't just pick it directly, instead you'll need to choose "Creative Mode", if you want "So Below" by Lena Raine, you have to choose "Nether" and then "Soul Sand Valley"
This can be slightly annoying because you don't always get the song that you want, but you can click the button several times until you get a song that satisfies you.
You can find out where each song plays on the [Minecraft Wiki Music Page](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Music). I might make a version where you can select a specific track from any album you want including the unused ones in Volume Alpha & Beta, however that would require a resource pack. Hope you enjoy!
